query:
SELECT TABLE_NAME, INDEX_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, SEQ_IN_INDEX
FROM information_schema.STATISTICS
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
  AND INDEX_NAME LIKE 'idx_%'
ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, INDEX_NAME, SEQ_IN_INDEX;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2nY6aM4N4o8j7TM.03f306c44314 --database m5gFtPM9Pr9uZ46M8fspGe --execute
